text: <par>Properly speaking, this compound really belongs under <xref ref="300">#300</xref> above, but is included here to point out the contrast with <latinform>nəi tui</latinform> 'amniotic fluid' (see section note).</par>
<par>This form constitutes good evidence for the independence of etyma <xref ref="665">#665</xref> and <xref ref="3558">#3558</xref>.</par>
